observations.note: All 58 tests collected and executed. 36 FAILED, 20 PASSED, 2 SKIPPED - confirms TDD Red phase.
Directory name STORY-433 contains hyphen, preventing Python relative imports. Used module-level constants instead of conftest imports.
20 passing tests confirm preconditions: source files exist, directories exist, non-migrated files present, BR-002 invariant holds.
AC#6 artifact-generation.md requires dual-file strategy: epic sections to architecture, requirements sections stay in ideation. 14 tests cover this split.
BR-003 fallback behavior (copy whole file if sections cannot be separated) not tested - would need mock/simulation infrastructure.

test_pyramid.note: All tests are unit-level filesystem assertions. Integration tests will validate end-to-end migration workflow.
